objects.name: Falcon for IT Supports Windows Secure Boot Certificate Lifecycle Management
objects.description: Starting March 10, 2026, my DShield sensor started getting probe for various AI models such as claude, openclaw, huggingface, etc. Reviewing the data already reported by other DShield sensors to ISC, the DShield database shows reporting of these probes started that day and has been active ever since.

external_references.description: Falcon for IT Supports Windows Secure Boot Certificate Lifecycle Management
